context: Tests whether GameKit advanced matchmaking, achievements, and challenge guidance uses current APIs and avoids stale examples.

checklist.name: Rule-based availability
checklist.description: Marks `queueName`, request properties, recipient properties, and match/player properties as iOS 17.2+ or equivalent platform release features.

checklist.name: Queue and property constraints
checklist.description: Uses reverse-DNS-style queue names and notes JSON-serializable properties, recipient-property key coverage, and the reserved `gc` key.

checklist.name: Rule-based API shape
checklist.description: Shows `GKMatchRequest.queueName`, `properties`, and `recipientProperties` with `GKMatchmaker.shared().findMatch(for:)`, then calls `finishMatchmaking(for:)` for programmatic matches.

checklist.name: Player attributes semantics
checklist.description: Explains that nonzero `playerAttributes` must combine across players with bitwise OR equal to `0xFFFFFFFF`, or recommends rule-based matchmaking for modern role logic.

checklist.name: Queue ignores legacy fields
checklist.description: States that when `queueName` is set, GameKit ignores `playerGroup` and `playerAttributes`.

checklist.name: Achievement progress
checklist.description: Reports achievement progress as an integer in 0...100 even though `percentComplete` is a `Double` property.

checklist.name: Challenge compose return shape
checklist.description: Treats `challengeComposeController(withMessage:players:completion:)` as returning a view controller to present, not an optional to unwrap.
